stemHtml: How can you use airborne weather radar to detect potential ice crystal icing ahead of the aircraft?

options.a: Use the radar tilt to find the core of the convective activity and avoid the area above it and downwind of it.
options.b: Adjust the radar range to enhance visibility of ice crystals on the screen.
options.c: Increase the radar gain to directly identify ice crystals on the display.
options.d: Use the radar echo intensity to determine the density of ice crystals.
